//: Emit config for the Pixi v7 adapter only. Separate from tsconfig.build.json (which EXCLUDES src/pixi7) so the adapter typechecks against v7 types via the `paths` override while tsc emits `import ... from "pixi.js"` unchanged into dist/pixi7. Same DOM lib + declaration settings as tsconfig.build.json. rootDir stays `src` so src/pixi7/index.ts emits to dist/pixi7/index.js and its `../pixi/textures.js` import stays valid at runtime (dist/pixi/textures.js is produced by the main build).
